articles.author: Mae Anderson
articles.title: Supply chain disruptions from the Iran war could raise prices for drugs, electronics and more - AP News
articles.description: The Iran war has halted oil tanker movement in the key Strait of Hormuz. The conflict is also disrupting the wider global supply chain beyond oil, affecting everything from pharmaceuticals from India, semiconductors from Asia and oil-derived products like fer…
articles.content: NEW YORK (AP) The Iran war has effectively halted oil tanker movement in the key Strait of Hormuz. But its also disrupting the wider global supply chain beyond oil, affecting everything from pharmace… [+6842 chars]
